title: 19. Neural Face
description: Neural Face Presence setup for the experimental wireframe face overlay, fullscreen/floating previews, lip sync, gaze, glow, and animation tuning.

steps.title: Open Neural Face
steps.body: Neural Face is its own addon tab and is marked experimental. It controls the wireframe face presence without changing Companion Orb settings.

steps.title: Notice the Experimental Label
steps.body: The red experimental label is intentional. Treat this renderer as a preview feature and test it after UI, TTS, and AI Presence settings are stable.

steps.title: Enable the Face Renderer
steps.body: Enable Neural Face Presence and choose the face style before using fullscreen or floating preview. The face can follow thinking and speaking state when AI Presence is active.

steps.title: Tune Lip Sync and Motion
steps.body: Lip sync, blink, gaze, glow, size, opacity, and animation should be adjusted in small steps. Too much animation can make the face feel laggy or distracting.

steps.title: Fullscreen Escape Behavior
steps.body: Fullscreen mode can be closed by mouse click or Escape. Test that before using it in a long session so you always know how to return to the main app.

steps.title: Watch Runtime Status
steps.body: The status label reports whether fullscreen or floating preview started successfully. Use it when diagnosing rendering or performance issues.
